caption: A news broadcast features a political graphic centered around the state of Bihar, depicted as a white map silhouette struck by a lightning bolt. To the left is a photo of Nitish Kumar, labeled as "मुख्यमंत्री नीतीश कुमार," and to the right are photos of ministers, including "डॉ. प्रेम कुमार" and "विजय चौधरी." A red banner across the middle reads "सुशासन पर चैलेंज," while the top header states "नीतीश को तेजस्वी की 'सीधी धमकी'". A red ticker at the bottom reads "PM: NDA सरकार बिहार के विकास में कसर नहीं छोड़ेगी" next to a "MAHAREED" logo and a timestamp of "10:04 PM." As the sequence progresses, the layout remains consistent, but new portraits of officials appear on the left side. A label "डिप्टी CM" is introduced, accompanied by photos of "सबरात चौधरी" and "विजय सिन्हा," who are added to the display alongside the existing figures.
